expectations.text: Has initial state with opacity: 0 and y offset

expectations.evidence: Uses delay: index * 0.1 instead of variants with staggerChildren. Functional but not the idiomatic Motion pattern.

expectations.text: Includes viewport once:true to prevent re-triggering
Uses spring transition for natural feel
expectations.evidence: Uses tween with duration: 0.5, ease: 'easeOut' instead of spring physics.
